title: Fridge catalog — all colors · hard rules · black filter in UI

filtersApplied.color: all colors included; use UI Black only filter

householdContext.freezeLoad: about half a normal freezer weekly
householdContext.layoutPreference: top_freezer preferred for space; bottom still listed
householdContext.aesthetics: black preferred not hard — filter available

rankingNote: Rank = lifestyle fit: inverter + capacity + brand trust + freeze notes + slight black bonus. Re-verify prices on B.TECH before buy.
disclaimer: Prices from B.TECH product listing/JSON-LD 2026-07-17. Photos hotlinked from retailer CDN.

items.name: Beko NoFrost Top Freezer Refrigerator , 455 Liter Inverter Motor , Black - RDNE455M20XBIDTEWEG
pros: Inverter motor claimed/confirmed — better odds for quieter run and lower cycling wear
Large total capacity (~455 L) — strong for weekly Friday meal-prep containers
Top freezer layout — classic max-fridge-shelf geometry for meal-prep trays
Black finish matches partner aesthetics preference
Beko has a relatively strong Egypt service/warranty footprint via big chains
Priced ~28,139 EGP — under hard 35k with some room
No water/ice dispenser (fewer leak/failure points)
items.summary: Beko ~455L black top freezer, inverter, ~28,139 EGP — fit 9.3/10 for meal-prep couple under 35k.
items.verifyNote: ProSmart + NeoFrost Dual Cooling + HarvestFresh; black 455L marketing
